faithful_note: Radial gravity-lens WARP fully RE (verbatim HgcBlackHole shader + HBlackHole::TransformPoint + CPU mip-pyramid wiring, blackhole.ts). Warp math faithful: engine-vs-headless 32-33 dB isolated at Amount 100/300/600 (fresh faithful-harness measure; residual is the documented ~1-2px sub-pixel halo from the 1920->input resample, NOT a warp error). numLevels=max(1,round(log2(Amount/8))) mip pyramid, per-level radius/edge from disasm. Embedded-sweep DIVERGED (10.4 at mix=0) is the unimplemented host Mix, which for a WARP blends INSIDE the mip-pipeline (probed: mix=0.5 != pixel-blend nor amount-scale) — complex + always Mix=1 in the only host (Movements__Black_Hole), so unexercised. Center reads .value (static in host); Amount curve read via blurAmount.
